title: The Ivana Trump Story: The First Wife
original_title: The Ivana Trump Story: The First Wife
overview: With contemporary voices and archival footage and interviews, the one-hour special weaves a robust narrative of the life and legacy of Ivana Trump – the mother, businesswoman and glamour queen whose eye for branding and design helped Donald Trump build an empire.
